title: zanthoxylum punctatum subsp. thomasianum
intro: Zanthoxylum punctatum subsp. thomasianum, also known as Thomas's prickly ash, is a subspecies of the Zanthoxylum punctatum plant, a type of flowering plant in the rutaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Thomas's prickly ash include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
